notes.workspace_id: Prefer the workspace UUID from rooiam-app for the hosted widget runtime.
notes.workspace_slug: Use only as local fallback if you do not have the workspace UUID yet.
notes.client_id: Create an app in the workspace and copy its real client ID here.
notes.app_name: App display name still matters for the registered OAuth client and downstream callback flow, but it is not appended to the hosted widget URL.
notes.widget_base_url: This is the hosted login widget runtime served by Rooiam.
